name: Scholar Search MCP
description_for_model: Use Scholar Search MCP for concept-level literature discovery, citation repair, known-item resolution, citation chasing, author pivots, and grounded follow-up research over saved searchSessionId result sets.
conversation_starters: Find the main research themes in retrieval-augmented generation for coding agents.
Repair this incomplete citation and give me the canonical paper plus alternatives.
Resolve the paper behind arXiv:1706.03762 and show its most important citations.
Map recent work on biomedical literature-review agents and highlight gaps.
Show me recent papers by this author and the best follow-up graph expansion.
Answer a grounded question using only the saved result set from my last search.
Find the Federal Register notice behind this ECOS species review and then show me the affected CFR text.
notes: Use mcp-tools.core.json instead when a smaller raw-tool subset is preferable.
Resources are surfaced from tool outputs via resourceUris and searchSessionId handles.
The server remains universal; these assets are packaging guidance, not a separate build.
